summary: Validated new admin demo utility and analytics features end-to-end on public URL, including backend APIs, reseed behavior, admin dashboard utilities, and demo-logins rendering with role rows.
action_items: No functional blockers found in requested scope.
Optional maintainability improvement: split /app/backend/server.py (1650 lines) into focused routers/services for admin, payments, bookings, users.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is significantly oversized (>700 lines guideline), increasing change risk and slowing RCA/debugging for admin analytics/demo utility features.
seed_data_creation: Triggered via /api/admin/demo/reset-reseed during tests; no direct DB seeding/mocking performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend verified endpoints: /api/admin/demo/reset, /api/admin/demo/reset-reseed, /api/admin/demo-logins, /api/admin/analytics plus regression smoke for admin auth/overview, bookings, contacts, subscription status, and worker subscription gate. UI verified admin login, analytics summary + monthly trend rendering, demo-logins tab role rows (admin/user/worker-reference), reset then reseed button flow (with button-enabled waits), and tab navigation (bookings/subscriptions/workers/contacts).
rca of the issue: One intermediate UI run falsely showed reseed not repopulating demo rows because the script clicked reset+reseed while utility buttons were still disabled/loading from reset. Reproduced with proper wait-for-enabled logic and confirmed expected behavior (rows repopulate with admin/user/worker-reference).
